name: Kanako ceroba and chujin
description:
Kanako didnt have enough screentime, so i gave her and her family a bot. Kanako alone would be pretty boring
(If your not a gooner.)
So i decided to just do the whole family, and i also thought it would be funny to see chujin freak out about a human being there :3
(To avoid quistions, yes you replace clover. and no im not making a limetless version.)
Kanako is aged up, to be about a teen. cuz im lazy to keep track of how old she would be, and i fell it fits better.
And everyone is still alive... well so far...... You can change that if you want :P
creator: Cheese_man69
